description: Iter 5 experiment plan: priority is ImageNet/ResNet-50, NoBN ablation, rho sweep, matched-rho SGD, VGG-16-BN full. All P0 must complete before writing stage.

reused_data.description: ResNet-20/CIFAR-10/AdamW, 7 methods x 3 seeds = 21 runs, 200 epochs. COMPLETE.
ResNet-20/CIFAR-100/AdamW, 7 methods x 3 seeds = 21 runs, 200 epochs. COMPLETE.
ResNet-20 SGD baseline, 7 methods x 3 seeds x 2 datasets = 42 runs. COMPLETE. Note: rho confound exists.

tasks.name: NoBN ResNet-20 CIFAR-10 Pilot
tasks.description: Quick feasibility pilot: ResNet-20-NoBN on CIFAR-10 with AdamW (lr=5e-4, wd=5e-4), 3 methods (constant, cwd_hard, no_wd), seed=42 only, 5 epochs. Verify NoBN training stability and measure per-epoch time. New model variant requires adding resnet20_nobn to models.py. Accept warning: expect worse accuracy at 5 epochs (convergence not expected at this scale). Main signal: does it train without divergence?

pilot.pass_criteria: Training does not diverge (loss < 5.0), model trains on GPU without OOM. No accuracy threshold (5 epochs insufficient for convergence).

tasks.name: Rho Sweep CIFAR-10 Pilot
tasks.description: Quick feasibility pilot: ResNet-20 on CIFAR-10 with AdamW at two new rho values. rho=0.05 (wd=5e-5), rho=5.0 (wd=5e-3). Methods: constant only. Seed=42, 5 epochs. Check: (1) rho=5.0 does not diverge at 5 epochs; (2) effective rho computed in first epoch matches target. Gradient clipping at max_norm=5.0 for rho=5.0. If rho=5.0 diverges within 5 epochs, fallback to rho=2.0 (wd=2e-3).

pilot.pass_criteria: rho=0.05 run completes with stable loss. rho=5.0 run either completes stably OR triggers fallback to rho=2.0 with stable completion. Measured rho in epoch 1 within 3x of target.

tasks.name: ImageNet ResNet-50 Pilot — Infrastructure Validation
tasks.description: Critical infrastructure pilot: verify ImageNet data loading works, ResNet-50 trains on 2 GPUs with DataParallel, bf16 mixed precision, and that diagnostics (per-layer rho, alignment cosine, CSI, AIS, BEM) are recorded correctly. Use 1 epoch only (full dataset). Methods: constant only. Seed=42. This is primarily an infrastructure check, not a results pilot. Expected: ~15-20 min for 1 epoch. NOTE: ImageNet data must be available at a valid path. If not present, the pilot script should use torchvision ImageNet with download=True (requires ~150 GB). Alternatively, use a 1% subset (1000 samples per class = 1000 images) for smoke test.

pilot.pass_criteria: 1 epoch completes without OOM or crash. Summary.json written with valid values for: best_test_acc (any non-NaN), per_layer_rho (list of layer rho values), alignment_cosine, BEM/CSI/AIS. Total epoch time measured and reported.

tasks.name: NoBN ResNet-20 CIFAR-10 Full Experiment
tasks.description: Full experiment: ResNet-20-NoBN on CIFAR-10, AdamW lr=5e-4 (reduced for NoBN stability), wd=5e-4, methods=[constant, cwd_hard, no_wd], seeds=[42, 123, 456], 200 epochs. Gradient clipping max_norm=1.0, warmup 10 epochs. New model variant resnet20_nobn required in models.py (replace all BatchNorm with Identity). Expected per-run time: ~20-25 min (constant), ~50 min (cwd_hard). Total: 9 runs * ~35 min avg = ~5.25 GPU-hours. GATE: passes after pilot_nobn shows stable training.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 3 methods converge stably. Best test_acc > 50% at epoch 5. No divergence.

visualizations.description: NoBN vs BN Phi Spread comparison (Cohen's d)

tasks.name: Rho=0.05 Sweep CIFAR-10 Full Experiment
tasks.description: Full experiment: ResNet-20 on CIFAR-10 with AdamW wd=5e-5 (targeting rho≈0.05), methods=[constant, cwd_hard, half_lambda, no_wd], seeds=[42, 123, 456], 200 epochs. Reuses existing code, only changes wd argument. Existing rho=0.5 data from iter_003 is already complete. Expected time: ~15-20 min per run (no cwd_hard slowdown expected at low wd). Total: 12 runs * ~18 min = ~3.6 GPU-hours.

pilot.pass_criteria: Training stable. Measured rho in epoch 1 is in [0.01, 0.2]. Best test_acc > 50% at epoch 5.

tasks.name: Rho=5.0 (or fallback Rho=2.0) Sweep CIFAR-10 Full Experiment
tasks.description: Full experiment: ResNet-20 on CIFAR-10 with AdamW wd=5e-3 (targeting rho≈5.0), methods=[constant, cwd_hard, half_lambda, no_wd], seeds=[42, 123, 456], 200 epochs. Gradient clipping max_norm=5.0. Early stopping if train_loss > 5.0 after 20 epochs. Fallback: if rho=5.0 diverges in pilot, use wd=2e-3 (rho≈2.0) instead and document. NOTE: This is the most important rho value for testing the trichotomy hypothesis — if spread is > 1% here, it validates Regime II/III existence.

pilot.pass_criteria: Training stable (or fallback triggered and documented). Loss < 5.0 at epoch 5. Method converges without NaN gradients.

visualizations.description: Phi Spread vs rho (critical point at rho=5.0)

tasks.name: Matched-Rho SGD CIFAR-10 Full Experiment
tasks.description: Full experiment: ResNet-20 on CIFAR-10 with SGDW (momentum=0.9), lr=0.01, wd=5e-3 to achieve rho≈0.5 (matching AdamW default). Methods: [constant, cwd_hard, no_wd], seeds=[42,123,456], 200 epochs. Existing SGD code in optimizers.py (UnifiedSGDW) reused. Purpose: if SGD/AdamW ratio drops from 18.3x to <3x at matched rho, confirms rho is the confounding variable. Record rho_per_layer in epoch 1 to verify matching. Expected: ~25 min per run. Total: 9 runs * 25 min = ~3.75 GPU-hours.

pilot.pass_criteria: Measured rho_per_layer mean in epoch 1 is in [0.2, 2.0] (within 4x of target rho=0.5). Training stable (loss < 5.0). Best test_acc > 50%.

visualizations.description: SGD vs AdamW Phi Spread at original vs matched rho

tasks.name: Matched-Rho SGD CIFAR-100 Full Experiment
tasks.description: Same as full_matched_rho_sgd_cifar10 but on CIFAR-100 to replicate the analysis on harder task. Same config: SGDW lr=0.01, wd=5e-3. Methods: [constant, cwd_hard, no_wd], seeds=[42,123,456], 200 epochs. Expected: ~30 min per run. Total: 9 runs * 30 min = ~4.5 GPU-hours.

pilot.pass_criteria: Training stable. Best test_acc > 15% (CIFAR-100 is harder). rho in [0.2, 2.0].

tasks.name: VGG-16-BN CIFAR-10 Full Experiment
tasks.description: Full experiment: VGG-16-BN on CIFAR-10, AdamW lr=1e-3, wd=5e-4, methods=[constant, cwd_hard, half_lambda, cosine_schedule, swd, random_mask, no_wd], seeds=[42, 123, 456], 200 epochs. Code confirmed working from iter_004 pilot. WARNING: cwd_hard is 2.3x slower (~2.8h per 200 epoch run). Dispatch non-cwd_hard methods first to free up GPUs. Total: 21 runs; fastest methods ~1.2h, cwd_hard ~2.8h. Total wall clock with 7-GPU parallelism: ~5-6h (3 seeds of slowest method sets the lower bound). Override note: This task exceeds 60 min due to confirmed VGG training time — necessary for architecture diversity.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 7 methods complete without OOM. cwd_hard time < 3x constant time. Best test_acc > 50%.

visualizations.description: VGG-16-BN main results: 7 methods x 3 seeds

tasks.name: ImageNet ResNet-50 Full Experiment — Seed 42
tasks.description: Full experiment Phase 1: ResNet-50 on ImageNet-1K, AdamW lr=1e-3, wd=1e-4 (targeting rho≈0.1, closer to deep Regime I), bf16 mixed precision, cosine LR schedule with 5-epoch warmup. Methods: [constant, cwd_hard, cosine_schedule, no_wd]. Seed=42 only. 90 epochs. DataParallel on 2 GPUs (batch 256 per GPU = 512 total). Expected: 2-3h per run, 4 runs = 8-12h with 4 GPUs (2 runs in parallel). GATE: requires pilot_imagenet_resnet50 to succeed. Override note: 90-epoch ImageNet training time ~2-3h per run is unavoidable for meaningful results. Per-layer rho heatmap (50 layers x 90 epochs) is the key novel figure.

pilot.pass_criteria: 1 epoch completes. top-1 accuracy > 10% at epoch 1 (random baseline 0.1%). Per-layer rho recorded. No OOM on 2x GPU.

visualizations.description: Per-layer rho heatmap: 50 layers x 90 epochs x 4 methods
ImageNet top-1/top-5 accuracy: 4 methods x seed 42

tasks.name: ImageNet ResNet-50 Full Experiment — Seed 123
tasks.description: Same as seed_42 but with seed=123. Depends on seed_42 completing and confirming ImageNet infrastructure works correctly. Methods: [constant, cwd_hard, cosine_schedule, no_wd]. 90 epochs, 2 GPUs DataParallel. Expected: 2-3h per run, 4 runs = 8-12h.

pilot.pass_criteria: 1 epoch completes. Reproducibility check: epoch 1 acc within 2% of seed_42 epoch 1.

visualizations.description: ImageNet results: 4 methods x 2 seeds (mean ± std)

tasks.name: ImageNet ResNet-50 Full Experiment — Seed 456
tasks.description: Same as seed_42 but with seed=456. Optional: if GPU time allows. Depends on seeds 42 and 123 completing. This provides the third seed for mean ± std reporting. If time-constrained, can be reported as 'N=2 seeds' with a note.

tasks.name: Cross-Architecture Analysis and Figure Generation
tasks.description: Comprehensive analysis of all Iteration 5 results. Compute: (1) Phi spread per architecture and dataset, (2) Cohen's d for NoBN vs BN, (3) Rho-Spread curve (3 points: 0.05, 0.5, 5.0), (4) SGD/AdamW ratio at original vs matched rho, (5) Cross-scale comparison table. Generate all 7 planned figures. Run verify_figures.py to confirm data-paper consistency. Output: analysis/iter5_summary.json, figures/*.{png,pdf}.

visualizations.description: Master results table: all architectures x datasets x methods

wave1.name: CIFAR Ablations
wave1.notes: Run pilots first to validate, then launch full_nobn, full_rho in parallel

wave1b.name: CIFAR Ablations Full
wave1b.notes: Launch as soon as pilots pass

wave2.name: VGG-16-BN Full
wave2.notes: 21 runs dispatched across GPUs 0-6; cwd_hard (3 seeds) dispatched last on GPU 7

wave3.name: ImageNet Infrastructure
wave3.notes: Must validate before committing to 12 long ImageNet runs

wave4.name: ImageNet Full Phase 1+2
wave4.notes: 2 methods in parallel (2 GPUs each) = 4 GPUs total. seed_42 and seed_123 can overlap if 8 GPUs available

wave5.name: ImageNet Phase 3 + Analysis
wave5.notes: seed_456 runs while analysis pipeline is being prepared

decisions: Determine trichotomy claim strength (Conjecture vs Theorem vs Empirical Finding)
Determine if SGD/AdamW ratio collapse confirms rho as primary confounder
Decide NoBN mechanism: ell_inf path sufficient or BN required
Determine paper claim scope: Scenario A/B/C/D
Confirm per-layer rho heatmap quality and novelty
Decide whether to proceed with seeds 123+456

writing_gate.trigger: Gate 1 + Gate 2 complete (minimum); Gate 3 strongly preferred
writing_gate.constraint: Writing stage BLOCKED until at minimum gate1 + gate2 pass
